member.name: T:SadConsole.Configuration.ConfigurationImGui
member.summary: Extensions to enable ImGui with SadConsole SFML.

member.name: M:SadConsole.Configuration.ConfigurationImGui.EnableImGui(SadConsole.Configuration.Builder,System.String,System.Single,System.Boolean,System.Action{SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent})
member.summary: Adds the ImGui SFML component to the game.
member.param: The font file to use with ImGui. Defaults to 'Roboto-Regular.ttf'.
The font size to use with ImGui. Defaults to 16.
Enables the docking feature of ImGui. Defaults to false.
A callback to add objects to the ImGui SFML component.

member.name: T:SadConsole.Configuration.ImGuiUpdateComponent
member.summary: A root component that updates ImGui input each frame before SadConsole processes input.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ExtensionsSystem.GetDebuggerDisplayValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Searches the object for a and returns its value. If not found, returns .

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.HierarchyHelper
member.summary: Provides helper methods for working with hierarchical items.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.HierarchyHelper.FlattenVisible``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Flattens a hierarchical collection into a single enumerable, respecting expand/collapse state.
member.returns: An enumerable of all visible items in tree order.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.HierarchyHelper.FlattenAll``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Flattens a hierarchical collection into a single enumerable, including all items regardless of expand state.
member.returns: An enumerable of all items in tree order.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.HierarchyHelper.Find``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},``0)
member.summary: Finds an item in the hierarchy by reference.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.HierarchyHelper.GetVisibleIndex``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},``0)
member.summary: Gets the index of an item within the flattened visible list.
member.param: The item to find the index of.
member.returns: The 0-based index of the item, or -1 if not found or not visible.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.HierarchyHelper.GetItemAtVisibleIndex``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the item at a specific index in the flattened visible list.
member.returns: The item at the specified index, or if index is out of range.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.HierarchyHelper.CountVisible``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Counts the total number of visible items in the hierarchy.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.HierarchyHelper.GetRoot``1(``0)
member.summary: Gets the root ancestor of an item.
member.param: The item to find the root of.
member.returns: The root ancestor, or the item itself if it has no parent.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.HierarchyHelper.GetAncestorPath``1(``0)
member.summary: Builds the ancestor chain from root to the specified item.
member.param: The item to build the path for.
member.returns: A list of ancestors from root to the item (inclusive).

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.HierarchyHelper.EnsureVisible``1(``0)
member.summary: Ensures all ancestors of an item are expanded so the item is visible.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.IHierarchicalItem`1
member.summary: Defines a hierarchical item that can have a parent and children, enabling tree-like structures.
member.typeparam: The type of the hierarchical item, which must implement this interface.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.IHierarchicalItem`1.Parent
member.summary: Gets or sets the parent of this item, or if this is a root item.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.IHierarchicalItem`1.Children
member.summary: Gets the children of this item.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.IHierarchicalItem`1.CanHaveChildren
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this item can contain children.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.IHierarchicalItem`1.ShowChildrenInHierarchy
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether children should be displayed in the hierarchy UI. When , children exist but are hidden from the tree view.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.IHierarchicalItem`1.IsExpanded
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this item's children are expanded in the UI. Only meaningful when and are .

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.IHierarchicalItem`1.Depth
member.summary: Gets the depth of this item in the hierarchy (0 for root items).

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiCore
member.summary: Shared objects that drive the ImGui integration for SadConsole.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiCore.ImGuiComponent
member.summary: SFML component for rendering ImGui.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiCore.GuiComponents
member.summary: The ImGui objects to draw each game frame.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiCore.Renderer
member.summary: The ImGui renderer.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1
member.summary: Makes a copy of a value and allows it to be changed. The change can be committed or reverted.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.OriginalValue
member.summary: The original value.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.CurrentValue
member.summary: The current value.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of this structure, wrapping the provided value.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.IsChanged
member.summary: Returns true when the original value doesn't equal the current value.
member.returns: A value to indicate changed state.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.Commit
member.summary: Sets the original value to the current value.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.Reset
member.summary: Sets the current value to the original value.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1
member.summary: Wraps a collection of objects for ImGui controls, like list boxes.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.Names
member.summary: Each item's title.
member.remarks: Refreshed when this property is accessed.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.Objects
member.summary: The objects wrapped by this list.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.Count
member.summary: The number of items this list is wrapping.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.SelectedItemIndex
member.summary: The selected index. Controlled by ImGui objects.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.SelectedItem
member.summary: The selected item or .
member.exception: Thrown when the property is set to a value that doesn't exist in the collection.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.#ctor(`0[])
member.summary: Creates a new list, wrapping the provided items.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Creates a new list, wrapping the provided items.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.#ctor(System.Int32,`0[])
member.summary: Creates a new list, wrapping the provided items, and sets which item is selected.
member.param: The 0-based index of the item to select.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Creates a new list, wrapping the provided items, and sets which item is selected.
member.param: The 0-based index of the item to select.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.IsItemSelected
member.summary: Indicates that an item is selected.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1
member.summary: Wraps an enum type for ImGui controls, like listboxes.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1.Names
member.summary: A collection of each enum name.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1.Values
member.summary: A collection of each enum value.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1.Count
member.summary: The count of the enums items.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1.GetValueFromIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a value from an index.
member.param: Index of the value to get.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1.GetIndexFromValue(`0)
member.summary: Gets an index from a value.
member.param: The value to get an index from.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectBase
member.summary: Represents an object drawn in ImGui.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectBase.IsVisible
member.summary: When true, this object should be drawn.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectBase.BuildUI(SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer)
member.summary: Draws this object.
member.param: The ImGui renderer drawing this object.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectCollection
member.summary: A collection of objects that can be added to a ImGui renderer.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectCollection.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new instance of this object.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectCollection.BuildUI(SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer)
member.summary: Draws the objects contained in this collection if is .

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer
member.summary: ImGui renderer for use with SFML.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.RebuildFontAtlas
member.summary: Creates a texture and loads the font data from ImGui. Should be called when the graphics device is initialized but before any rendering is done.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.BindTexture(SFML.Graphics.Texture)
member.summary: Creates a pointer to a texture, which can be passed through ImGui calls such as . That pointer is then used by ImGui to let us know what texture to draw.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.UnbindTexture(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImTextureID)
member.summary: Removes a previously created texture pointer, releasing its reference and allowing it to be deallocated.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.UnbindTexture(SFML.Graphics.Texture)
member.summary: Removes a previously created texture pointer, releasing its reference and allowing it to be deallocated.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.BeforeLayoutInput(System.Single)
member.summary: Runs the ImGui input. Call before .
member.param: Time elapsed since last frame in seconds.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.BeforeLayout
member.summary: Sets up ImGui for a new frame, should be called at frame start.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.AfterLayout
member.summary: Asks ImGui for the generated geometry data and sends it to the graphics pipeline, should be called after the UI is drawn using ImGui.** calls.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.SetupInput
member.summary: Setup key input event handler.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.UpdateInput
member.summary: Sends SFML input state to ImGui.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.RenderDrawData(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImDrawDataPtr)
member.summary: Gets the geometry as set up by ImGui and sends it to the graphics device.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.WantsMouseCapture
member.summary: When , indicates that the ImGui input system is going to use the mouse, for example when the mouse is over a UI element; otherwise .

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.WantsKeyboardCapture
member.summary: When , indicates that the ImGui input system is going to use the keyboard, for example when focus is on a textbox; otherwise .

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.HideRequested
member.summary: When , indicates that the UI should be hidden and stopped. Once it's hidden and stopped, this property is set to .

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.AddFontTTF(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Adds a TTF font file to ImGui.
member.param: Path to the TTF font file.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.SetDefaultFont(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImFontPtr)
member.summary: Sets the default font for ImGui and rebuilds the font atlas.
member.param: The font to set as default.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.HasBoundTexture(SFML.Graphics.Texture)
member.summary: Returns whether a texture is already bound.
member.returns: if the texture is bound; otherwise .

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.GetBoundTexturePointer(SFML.Graphics.Texture)
member.summary: Gets the ImGui texture ID for a bound SFML texture.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiRenderer.ReplaceBoundTexture(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImTextureID,SFML.Graphics.Texture)
member.summary: Replaces an already-bound texture with a new one, keeping the same ImGui texture ID.
member.param: The ImGui texture ID to update.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent
member.summary: Manages the ImGui integration with the SFML game loop.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent.ImGuiRenderer
member.summary: The ImGui renderer used for drawing.

member.name: E:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent.HostClosed
member.summary: Raised when the ImGui host is closed/hidden.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent.WantsMouseCapture
member.summary: Gets whether ImGui wants to capture mouse input.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent.WantsKeyboardCapture
member.summary: Gets whether ImGui wants to capture keyboard input.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent.UIComponents
member.summary: The ImGui UI objects to draw each frame.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent.BeforeNewFrameLayoutObject
member.summary: An optional layout object that runs before the new frame layout.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the component is enabled (processes update/draw).

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent.Visible
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the component is visible (draws ImGui).

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent.#ctor(SFML.Graphics.RenderWindow,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new ImGui SFML component.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent.Update(System.Single)
member.summary: Updates ImGui input state. Call this during the update phase of the game loop.
member.param: Time elapsed since last frame in seconds.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiSFMLComponent.Draw
member.summary: Draws the ImGui UI. Call this during the draw phase of the game loop, after SadConsole has drawn.

member.name: T:System.Numerics.ExtensionsColorNumerics
member.summary: Extensions to convert to/from .

member.summary: Converts a to a .

member.summary: Converts a to a .

member.summary: Converts a to a .

member.name: M:System.Numerics.ExtensionsColorNumerics.ToColor(System.Numerics.Vector3)
member.summary: Converts a to a .

member.name: M:System.Numerics.ExtensionsColorNumerics.ToVector2(SadRogue.Primitives.Point)
member.summary: Converts a to a .

member.name: M:System.Numerics.ExtensionsColorNumerics.ToUV(SadRogue.Primitives.Point,SadRogue.Primitives.Point)
member.summary: Gets a representing the UV coordinates of a within a size.
